# Sale Order Invoice Date

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Display the invoice date on Sales Order analysis reports.

The invoice date is considered to be the latest invoice date linked to fully
invoiced sales.
